title: Tounatea eriocarpa
taxonomy: Tounatea eriocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of New Caledonia. The plant belongs to the genus Tounatea, which is a small group of flowering plants. Tounatea eriocarpa is classified as an evergreen shrub or small tree, with a compact growth habit and shiny leaves. Further classification within the plant kingdom may include its order, family, and other taxonomic details.
uses: Tounatea eriocarpa has been traditionally used in various cultures, particularly in the Pacific Island region, for its medicinal properties.
